rulings.Case Title: CHIA-PI TIEN VS. LEONIE ASHLEY OOSTROM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 15, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT LEONIE OOSTROM MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication GRANTED. Moving party has shifted its burned and opposing party failed to create a triable issue of material fact with competent admissible evidence. Defendant's Objections to Plaintiff's evidence are sustained. Prevailing party to prepare order per CCP 437c. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDERSON JONES ET AL VS. JENNY J. KIM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant Jenny J. Kim'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 15, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT JENNY KIM Notice Of Defendant Jenny J. Kim'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint GRANTED. Cross-Complaint shall be filed forthwith. The Court also notes that opposing party failed to provide courtesy copy of opposition. Failure to comply with SFLR or any other procedural rules in future will be subject to motion being treated as unopposed. =(501/REQ)
